title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at 5paisa International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at 5paisa International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, 5paisa International Enterprises in Pimpri-Chinchwad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About 5paisa International Enterprises:
5paisa International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 5paisa International Enterprises!
